title: Verify Snyk Code ignores API availability/usability

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Started: validate whether Snyk Code consistent-ignores API is available and usable in this org by making authenticated read-only API calls first, then safe write-test only if needed.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text:
Snyk API capability check complete (2026-03-02).

What was tested (org: `dbec85a8-d7a0-482a-b5c4-eb609a451b53`):
- `GET /rest/orgs/{org_id}/policies?version=2025-11-05` -> **HTTP 200** (API available)
- `POST /rest/orgs/{org_id}/policies?version=2025-11-05` with a harmless probe ignore policy -> **HTTP 201** (write works)
- `DELETE /rest/orgs/{org_id}/policies/{policy_id}?version=2025-11-05` on that probe policy -> **HTTP 204** (cleanup works)
- Final list check -> policy count back to 0.

Notes:
- Auth header that worked in this environment: `Authorization: Bearer <access_token>`.
- `Authorization: Token <access_token>` returned 401 for this OAuth token flow.

Conclusion:
- The Consistent Ignores for Snyk Code API is available and usable in this org/account context.
